features: A gentle antibacterial soap that cleanses and soothes the skin
Leaves skin feeling moisturised and silky smooth
Doesn’t dry out skin and helps neutralise odour
Dermatologist tested and suitable for sensitive skin
description: Product Description Cidal bar soap is an antibacterial soap that provides everyday protection against germs. Its gentle formula doesn’t dry out skin, but leaves it feeling moisturised, soft and silky smooth. With its fresh pink grapefruit fragrance, it leaves skin feeling refreshed. Dermatologist tested, it is suitable for sensitive skin. Ingredients Sodium Palmate, Aqua, Sodium Palm Kernelate, Glycerine, Palm Kernel Acid, Cocamide DEA, Parfum, Sodium Chloride, Citrus Grandis Fruit Extract, Ascorbic Acid, Panthenol, O-Phenylphenol, Tetrasodium EDTA, Tetrasodium Etidronate, Citronellol, Geraniol, Limonene, Linalool, CI 77891, CI 15880 Safety Warning Avoid contact with eyes. Manufacturer Contact Information Lornamead UK Ltd, Wiltshire, BA14 0XB. See more
